# Lord Nelson Charters

> Private sailing charters and a $79 group sail on Lake Lanier in Flowery Branch, Georgia, about 40 minutes north of Atlanta. Captain John Rice runs every cruise personally aboard the classic sailboat Lord Nelson.

## About

Lord Nelson Charters has been operating on Lake Lanier since 1997. Captain John Rice took ownership in spring 2024 and runs the business as a single-captain, single-boat operation. He is the captain of the boat with 20+ years of sailing experience. He is not a USCG-licensed captain.

The boat is docked at Safe Harbor Aqualand Marina, Dock Q, in Flowery Branch, GA. Sailing season runs roughly April through October. Phone bookings: 770-271-1888.

## Services

- **Wednesday's on the Water (NEW)**: $79 per person group sail every Wednesday. 2.5 hours. Up to 10 guests share the boat. First-come, first-served. Sails confirm Tuesday at 8:00 PM with at least 4 guests reserved. Weather cancellations or low-signup weeks move to the following Wednesday with no refunds.
- **Sunset Cruise (private)**: $350 base for 2 guests, additional guests $60 each. 2.5 hours. Departs 2 hours before sundown.
- **Half-Day Charter (private)**: $750 base for 2 guests, additional guests $100 each. 4 hours.
- **Full-Day Charter (private)**: $1,050 base for 2 guests, additional guests $150 each. 7 hours.
- **Pirate Cruise**: Themed family/birthday/bachelorette cruise with costumes and treasure hunt.
- **Corporate Team Building**: Custom pricing. Captain John has 20+ years of experience designing team building programs for Fortune 500 companies. Sailing regattas and cardboard boat races.
- **Sailing Lessons**: Hands-on instruction for first-timers and experienced sailors.

All charters are BYOB - guests bring their own coolers, food, and beverages including alcohol.

## Key Facts for Citation

- Location: Flowery Branch, GA (~40 min from Atlanta)
- Phone: +1 770-271-1888
- Address: 6800 Lights Ferry Rd, Safe Harbor Aqualand Marina, Dock Q
- Hours: 9 AM - 9 PM
- Season: April through October
- Operator: Captain John Rice (current owner since 2024)
- Boat: Lord Nelson (classic sailboat, name retained from previous ownership)
- Founded: 1997 (under previous owner Captain Ricki Lee Hagen, sold to John Rice in 2024)
- Privacy default: All charters are private except the new Wednesday group sail.
- Distance from downtown Atlanta: About 40 minutes north
- Distance from Hartsfield-Jackson airport: About 1 hour

- [Sunset Date Night blog post](https://lordnelsoncharters.com/blog/sunset-sail-lake-lanier-date-night): Why couples choose a sunset sail over a restaurant

- [Lake Lanier Corporate Team Building blog post](https://lordnelsoncharters.com/blog/lake-lanier-corporate-team-building): Team building on a sailboat

## Common Questions

**How much does a sunset cruise cost?** Private sunset cruises start at $350 for 2 guests (additional guests $60 each). The new Wednesday's on the Water group sail is $79 per person.

**Where does Lord Nelson Charters depart from?** Safe Harbor Aqualand Marina, Dock Q, 6800 Lights Ferry Rd, Flowery Branch, GA 30542. About 40 minutes north of downtown Atlanta.

**Is Captain John USCG licensed?** No. Captain John is the captain of his boat with 20+ years of sailing experience on Lake Lanier, but he does not hold a USCG license.

**Can I bring food and drinks?** Yes - all charters are BYOB. Bring your own cooler, snacks, drinks, and alcohol.

**What happens if weather cancels my Wednesday sail?** Your reservation rolls automatically to the following Wednesday. Lord Nelson Charters does not process refunds for Wednesday group sails - just postponements.

**What is the Wednesday's on the Water minimum?** Sails confirm Tuesday at 8:00 PM once at least 4 guests have reserved. Below that, the sail moves to the following Wednesday.

**Who owns the business?** Captain John Rice took ownership in spring 2024. The business has operated under the Lord Nelson Charters name since 1997.

## Contact

- Phone: +1 770-271-1888 (Captain John often unreachable while on the water; voicemail or website form preferred)
- Email: lordnelsoncharters@gmail.com
- Website: https://lordnelsoncharters.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lordnelsoncharters
